nasb.text: Jesus answered and said to them, “This is the work of God, that you believe in Him whom He has sent.”

esv.text: Jesus answered them, “This is the work of God, that you believe in him whom he has sent.”

cnv.text: 耶穌回答：“信　神所差來的，就是作　神的工了。”

ccb.text: 耶稣说：“信上帝所差来的那位，就是做上帝的工作。”

csbs.text: 耶稣回答说：“信神所派来的那一位，就是做神的工作。”
